title: ReasoningAgentOutput
description: Structured output schema for specialist reasoning agents. Every specialist agent MUST return JSON conforming to this schema.

reasoning_family.description: Human-readable name of the reasoning family

applies.description: Whether this reasoning family is relevant to the task

confidence.description: Confidence that this family applies (0.0 = not at all, 1.0 = certain)

rationale.description: Why this family does or does not apply

problem_reframing.description: How this reasoning family reframes the problem

key_questions.description: The primary questions this family asks about the task

key_findings.description: Substantive findings from applying this reasoning

missing_information.description: Information that would improve the analysis if available

reasoning_modes_applied.description: Which specific reasoning modes within the family were most relevant

relationships.description: Semantic relationships in 'conceptA -> relation -> conceptB' format

confidence.description: Overall confidence in the analysis quality

verification_suggestions.description: How the findings could be verified

cross_referral_requests.description: Requests for input from other specialist agents. The orchestrator collects these after pass 1 and fulfils them in refinement passes.

target_agent_id.description: The ID of the specialist agent whose perspective is needed (e.g. 'normative_legal')

question.description: The specific question to ask that agent

reason.description: Why this cross-referral would improve the analysis

pass_number.description: Which pass this result was produced in (1 = initial, 2+ = refinement)

refinement_context.description: Context injected by the orchestrator from other agents' findings (empty on pass 1)
